title: patrinia rupestris subsp. scabra
intro: Patrinia rupestris subsp. scabra, also known as Patrinia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of China, Korea, and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. Patrinia is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In traditional herbal preparations, Patrinia is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
